data.title: A trader spent 1 BNB to buy Broccoli and got a return of 9900 times
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a trader spent 1 BNB (US$707) to buy Meme coin Broccoli, and currently has a profit of US$7 million, with a return of 9,900 times.

data.title: Framework Ventures leads $20 million Series A for stablecoin firm Plasma
data.description:
The firm plans to use its funding to continue developing the Plasma blockchain, which is an EVM-compatible Bitcoin sidechain to facilitate USDT transfers with no fees.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/340726/framework-ventures-leads-20-million-series-a-for-stablecoin-firm-plasma?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Robert F. Kennedy Jr. Confirmed As U.S. Health Secretary
data.description: According to Odaily, the U.S. Senate has voted to confirm Robert F. Kennedy Jr. as the Secretary of Health. Previously a presidential candidate, Kennedy is known for his favorable stance towards cryptocurrency. He has disclosed owning at least $1 million in Bitcoin and has no plans to divest from this asset.

data.title: US Senate votes to confirm crypto-friendly Robert Kennedy Jr. as Surgeon General
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News The U.S. Senate voted to confirm Robert F. Kennedy Jr. as Secretary of Health. (Jinshi) Robert Kennedy Jr., a former U.S. presidential candidate and crypto-friendly person, disclosed that he holds at least $1 million in Bitcoin and has no plans to divest the assets.

data.title: CZ reiterates that he will not issue Meme coins, only publishes photos and names of pet dogs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Binance Co-founder CZ posted on the X platform: "For those who asked me for CA (contract address), no, I will not issue meme coins. I just posted a photo of my dog ​​and its name, as some of you requested. I also got suggestions yesterday to let the best Meme coin in the community become the winner."

data.title: Tether slams JPMorgan analysts for saying it may need to sell Bitcoin
data.description:
Tether slammed JPMorgan analysts for speculation that the issuer may need to sell its Bitcoin holdings to comply with newly proposed US stablecoin bills.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/tether-slams-jpmorgan-analysts-sell-bitcoin?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: CZ posts photo of dog Broccoli
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Binance co-founder CZ posted a photo of his pet dog Broccoli on the social platform. CZ said that he chose a name starting with "B" for his pet dog. The reason for choosing Broccoli is that the pronunciation of this word is similar to the blockchain "Blockchain" and he cannot get rid of cryptocurrency.
CZ added that this time he only posted the photo and name of his dog. He did not issue meme coins himself. Whether to issue meme coins is decided by the community, but it may interact with some popular meme coins on BNB Chain (BSC). The BNB Foundation may reward popular memes on the BNB chain, give LP support or other rewards. The details are still under discussion and more content will be released soon.
